Title: h3 has a Path Traversal via Percent-Encoded Dot Segments in serveStatic Allows Arbitrary File Read
Description: `serveStatic()` in h3 is vulnerable to path traversal via percent-encoded dot segments (`%2e%2e`), allowing an unauthenticated attacker to read arbitrary files outside the intended static directory on Node.js deployments.
AffectedVersions: All versions before 1.15.6, all versions starting from 2.0.0 before 2.0.1-rc.15
NotImpacted: All versions starting from 1.15.6 before 2.0.0, all versions starting from 2.0.1-rc.15
